description: A designed ICE enforcement-messaging graphic aimed at employers (promoting the IMAGE worksite-compliance program). The background is a photograph of a commercial restaurant kitchen where two workers in pale blue caps, white t-shirts, aprons, and food-prep gloves cook at a stainless-steel range; the foreground worker (a woman) tends a frying pan amid steaming pots, with a second worker behind her. Over the dark left side of the image is large grungy, stencil/distressed typography: 'IT'S TIME TO' in white, then 'GET RIGHT' and 'WITH THE' and a very large 'LAW' in bold yellow weathered lettering. Bottom-left in white reads the URL 'ICE.gov/IMAGE'. Bottom-right shows the gray DHS Department of Homeland Security seal above the white 'ICE' wordmark. The messaging technique is an implied-threat compliance ad targeting business owners who hire unauthorized immigrant labor (kitchen/food-service workers as the visual stand-in), pressuring them to 'get right with the law' via the IMAGE program. Target audience: U.S. employers in industries that employ immigrant labor.
notable_text: 'IT'S TIME TO GET RIGHT WITH THE LAW'; 'ICE.gov/IMAGE'; 'ICE'
